name: pollpulse-platform
description: Full-stack poll creation, sharing, response collection and real-time analytics platform.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build:prod: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --production --prefix backend
scripts.deploy: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm start --prefix backend
scripts.check: node --check backend/src/server.js && node --check backend/src/app.js && node --check backend/src/config/env.js && node --check backend/src/config/database.js && node --check backend/src/models/User.js && node --check backend/src/models/Poll.js && node --check backend/src/controllers/authController.js && node --check backend/src/controllers/pollController.js && node --check backend/src/middleware/auth.js && node --check backend/src/middleware/errorHandler.js && node --check backend/src/routes/authRoutes.js && node --check backend/src/routes/pollRoutes.js && node --check backend/src/services/analyticsService.js && node --check backend/src/socket/index.js && node --check backend/src/utils/tokens.js
